login.title: One door. One login.
login.subtitle: No passwords. New here? Signing in creates your account. Members post deals and see the board.
login.linkExpired: That link expired or was already used. Enter your email below and we will send a fresh one.
login.notConfigured: Sign-in becomes available once Supabase Auth is connected. Add your Supabase keys to enable magic-link and Google login.
login.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a magic sign-in link.
login.googleDisabled: Google sign-in disabled (no client ID configured).
